description_long: This object is a modern cash register with a rectangular base and an angled display screen mounted on top. The display appears to be a large, flat panel, likely an LCD or touchscreen, set within a thick bezel. The base of the register is boxy and solid, with a section that likely houses a cash drawer, and a smaller protruding section that may contain a receipt printer or additional controls. The overall finish is dark and matte, giving it a professional and utilitarian appearance suitable for retail or service environments. There are no visible brand markings or logos, and the keypad is not clearly visible from any angle. The design suggests durability and functionality, with interactive parts such as a screen, possible buttons, and a cash drawer.
description: A modern, boxy cash register with a large angled display and a solid, matte-finished base, likely featuring a cash drawer and receipt printer slot.
description_view_0: The angled display screen and the main body of the register are clearly visible, with a possible button or control on the base.
description_view_1: The side profile shows the full length of the cash register, highlighting the depth of the base and the open display screen.
description_view_2: The rear view emphasizes the thickness of the display and the back of the base, with less detail visible on the interactive parts.
description_view_3: A top-down view showing the full surface area of the display screen and the rectangular layout of the base.
